stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The aircraft is maintaining the R-240 outbound from the VOR. The pilot had previously tuned the VOR and positively identified it using the morse code identifier. The pilot then resets the CDI to course 040°. Which of the following HSI figures is correct?

options.a: Figure A and to intercept the aircraft will turn right.
options.b: Figure B and to intercept the aircraft will turn right.
options.c: Figure C and to intercept the aircraft will turn left.
options.d: Figure D and to intercept the aircraft will turn left.
